message:
fix(e2e): Fix logic bugs and improve test stability in collapsible tests

- Fix bug where alternative selectors found elements but wrong locator
  was used (details vs altCollapsibles)
- Add scrollIntoView + force:true pattern to all click operations for
  element stability (prevents timeout errors)
- Use expectedContent variable to verify clipboard matches code content
- Change const to let for reassignable locator variables

These fixes ensure tests work reliably across browsers and prevent
flaky timeout failures on element interactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
